text.title: voice-ui Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns repeatedly observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Engineers wrote intents from screen-name; user phrasings never appear. NLU misclassifies real utterances.
antipattern.fix: Author ≥3 sample dialogues per intent first; derive intents/slots from them.

antipattern.symptom: Voice replies 'I didn't catch that' on every miss; user repeats and gives up.
Prompt 'I will now proceed to schedule your appointment for next Tuesday at 3 PM' is 14 words.
antipattern.root-cause: Author wrote prompt as text, not as speech.
antipattern.fix: Cut to ≤12 words: 'Tuesday at 3 PM. Confirm?'

antipattern.symptom: User says 'pay $500'; bot pays without 'Yes' confirmation. Charges disputed.
antipattern.fix: Mandate explicit confirm for irreversible actions; spec lists them.
